content.en:
Studying the Eternal Flint is dangerous, and if you are not careful, you will die.

At the beginning, the Giant Stone Tribe dared to study the Eternal Flint Stone, and they also tested it with many Eightfold Ancestor level clansmen, anyway, they didn't care about the unwise clansmen at all.

For the Boulder Tribe, or other Primordial Artifact Tribes, only the Avatar-level Clansmen and the Wise Clans are valuable, and everything else can be sacrificed.

Sure enough.

Ye Tian began to study the Eternal Flint and hit a wall everywhere, but on this day, the power of the Eternal Flint swept through Ye Tian's body, and with the weak body of the Soul Splitting Red Beast, it was directly incinerated into ashes.

A replica body has fallen!

Next, Ye Tian tried again and again, not caring about the loss of the copy body.

After an unknown number of attempts, Ye Tian gradually gained enough understanding of the value of the Eternal Firestone.

This treasure is very magical, containing very terrifying power, but it is also very restrained, and even if the energy escapes, if it is not absorbed, it can also be absorbed back by the eternal flint, so as to ensure that the energy of the eternal flint is not exhausted.

In the blink of an eye, a long time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally had a good research success.

The Eternal Flint can temper the body, as long as you master the strength and method, you can greatly temper the body, make the body stronger and stronger, and even slightly increase the level of life.

This is also the result of Ye Tian's countless experiments.

It has always been difficult to improve the life level, if you can use the power of the Eternal Fire Stone to improve the life level, it is undoubtedly a real great opportunity!

In fact, the essence of the Eternal Fire Stone can improve the life level of the Ninefold Origin Ancestor Peak Strong, but under normal circumstances, only the Ninefold Origin Ancestor Peak Extreme, and after being qualified to impact the Supreme Ninefold Origin Ancestor, the Eternal Fire Stone can be used.

If other Dao Ancestors wanted to use the Eternal Flint Stone, they would easily be incinerated to ashes.

This is also the reason why Shadow Stone only dares to use the Eternal Flint after he has achieved the ultimate of the Transformation Level, and he does not dare to use the Eternal Fire Stone to practice until he reaches the ultimate of the Transformation Level.

In other words, using the Eternal Flint to assist in cultivation, only Ye Tiancai has hope at present.

"I used the body of the Soul Splitting Red Beast to test before, and the way of refining it may not be suitable for the human body. I have to find a way to test my body!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After all, the results of the test are different for different bodies, and almost lead to mistakes.

Immediately, Ye Tian thought of a solution, that is, to let the real body copy body hide in the body of the Soul Splitting Red Beast, and with the Soul Splitting Red Beast to resist the Soul Splitting Red Light, the true body's copy body would be fine.

As for research, you can make the body of the Soul Splitter Red Beast turn into a large hall, and then place the eternal flint inside the main hall, and the replica body of the real body will be tested inside the main hall.

Of course.

The downside of this is that if the experiment fails, both replicating bodies will crumble.

But Ye Tian didn't care about this.

So, he tried again and again.

Due to his previous experience, Ye Tian spent most of the time less this time, and finally succeeded in the experiment.

After the experiment was successful, Ye Tian was ready to use the Eternal Flint Stone to temper his body, strengthen his physical body, and improve his life level by the way.

In particular, the elevation of the level of life is of great significance.

......

"Let's start practicing with the Eternal Flint Stone!"

Ye Tian urged the power of the Immeasurable Dao Domain and began to draw a trace of energy from the Eternal Firestone, which was an unbearable energy for Ye Tian today.

But at the critical moment, he integrated this trace of energy into the Immeasurable Dao Domain, dispersing the energy, making the entire Immeasurable Dao Domain filled with the breath of eternal flint.

In this way, if the energy is dispersed, it will not be able to cause much damage to Ye Tian, nor will it exceed his tolerance limit.

Due to the success of Ye Tian's experiment, he successfully mastered the control of energy.

Immediately, the eternal flint energy in the Immeasurable Dao Domain began to pour into his body for refining.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's body seemed to have collapsed again and again, but fortunately, his life-preserving ability was very strong, and he had a lot of life-preserving Yuan Dao Ancestral Endowments, so he could use this way to refine.

In other words, even if Ye Tian leaked this method, other Dao Ancestors would not be able to imitate it at all.

"The effect of refining is very good, I don't know how many times faster than my solo cultivation!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After obtaining this rapid ascension, Ye Tian fell into a long retreat and no longer ventured elsewhere.

Gradually, hundreds of billions of years of Primordial Era passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's physical body was already extremely powerful, not even inferior to the physical body of the half-step Ninefold Ancestor, and his life level had also increased significantly.

Although he was still in the early stage of the Yae Primordial Period, the last time he tested it, he found that his life level had reached the level of 60.

You must know that many half-step ninefold ancestors, their life level can hope to reach 60!

Not only that, in the process of using the Eternal Flint Energy countless times, Ye Tian's Immeasurable Dao Domain had also been tempered again and again, causing the strength of the Immeasurable Dao Domain to increase by more than eighty percent.

It can be said that Ye Tian's current strength is at least ten times stronger than in the past.

"My current strength may have surpassed that of the Peerless Sword Dao Ancestor!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At the beginning, the strength of the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor made it difficult for him to look up, but he didn't expect that his strength would be able to match the other party's level so quickly.

At the same time, Ye Tian made another discovery.

"My cultivation has actually grown for a while in the tempering process of using the Eternal Firestone, and now I am approaching the middle stage of the Eightfold Primordial Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

He felt that it would not take too long for him to break through to the middle stage of the Yae Origin Ancestor.

And once he breaks through to the middle stage of the Yae Origin Ancestor, his strength will have to skyrocket.

And on this day, a big thing happened to cut off the district boundary.

Rumble!!!!

The entire truncated area boundary began to grow, and a large number of community boundaries were born, which made the number of community boundaries of the entire truncated area break 200,000 for a while.

You must know that the original truncated community boundaries were only tens of thousands of community boundaries, and there are so many more community boundaries at once, which shows how fast the truncated community boundaries are growing!

Not only that, but the resources that cut off the boundaries of the area have also skyrocketed all of a sudden.

From this moment on, the truncated region boundary has officially stepped into the ranks of the yellow-level regional boundary, and it is still growing rapidly, developing towards the Xuan-level regional boundary.

And from this time on, the Nine Buildings sent another group of Dao Ancestors to settle in the Yellow Tower, and those forces and Dao Ancestors who originally belonged to the boundary of the Hanhai District all rushed to the boundary of the Truncation District, so that the boundary of the Hanhai District really declined, and it was no longer a large regional boundary.
